---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

class: slideblue

.size70[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size40[

Final Exam Paper

+ Get feedback on your outlines
]

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2022)
]]

???

## Prep for class

1. ...



---

class: middle, slideblue

.size50[**Final Exam (Due May 11, 3pm)**]

.size40[
Analyze a recent international political event using three of the theories, models or causal mechanisms we've studied in class this term. 

+ Make a convincing argument
	+ (e.g. logical, clear, credible and critical)

+ Evidence: Class material and beyond (as needed)
]

???

This week we continue building up to your final exam paper.

WITH A COUPLE DAYS TO THINK ABOUT IT, ANY QUESTIONS ON THIS PROMPT?



---

class: middle, center, slideblue

.size60[**Assignment for Today**]

<br>

.size45[
Review your class notes and identify three theories, models or mechanisms we studied this term that could each provide a useful explanation of your event. 

Come to class with your three choices (e.g. premises) an an outline for your final paper.
]

???

DOES EVERYBODY HAVE THEIR OUTLINE?

Get feedback from AT LEAST TWO PEOPLE and then start writing!

Small groups present and discuss each outline. 

Get feedback. 

- Did you pick good premises? 
- Do you need help finding other options?



---

class: middle, center, slideblue

.size60[**Assignment for Friday**]

.size45[
Revise your outline based on the class feedback.

Bring a rough draft of your paper to class.
]

???
